title: IRL Lore
html:
IRL Lore

iOS journaling app concept — turns scattered text entries into AI-coauthored "lore" with monthly Spotify-wrap-style summaries and paywalled prediction cards. A direct pivot out of the August 2025 gossip-app brainstorm. Lives in the stealth-apps cluster as the non-gambling counterpart to Swipr — both share the addictive-daily-ritual + premium-reveal architecture, IRL Lore lacks the legal-fraught betting layer.

TL;DR

  • Core mechanic: scattered text entries → AI-coauthored personal "lore" narrative
  • Engagement loop: monthly Spotify-wrap-style retrospectives + paywalled prediction cards
  • Stack: SwiftUI + Supabase + gpt-5o-mini
  • Lineage: pivots from the "that girl" gossip app brainstorm (Aug 16) → full PRD (Aug 29). Sibling to Swipr in the session/feed-engagement-loop pattern.

Chronology

  • 2023-12-30 — 2023 12 30 current thoughts on te amo — earliest Te-Amo-as-journal precursor
  • 2024-07-12 — 2024 07 12 wrld side quests — the wrld brand sibling thread
  • 2024-12-04 — 2024 12 04 requirements document 2 — early requirements adjacent
  • 2025-08-16 — 2025 08 16 that girl type app — pivot origin, the gossip-app it pivoted out of
  • 2025-08-29 — 2025 08 29 irl lore / 2025 08 29 irl lore prd — full PRD (sibling docs)
  • 2025-10-03 — 2025 10 03 im moving to austin — referenced in the Austin-move planning
  • 2026-02-09 — 2026 02 09 swipr session based accuracy betting — sibling cross-reference (same engagement-loop primitive)
  • 2026-03-04 — 2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note — referenced in Outpace cousin-architecture pass

Why it matters

IRL Lore proves the engagement-loop primitive Yahir keeps converging on across his 2025–26 product thinking: daily-ritual + AI-augmented summary + premium-reveal paywall. Same shape as swipr, outpace, brotein — different domain (personal narrative vs prediction vs activity vs nutrition), same architecture. The cluster is the signal.
